title: 03-06-2026 Update
author: Yoshi
content:
Deadlock - Gameplay Update - 03-06-2026 - Steam News

[ General ] - Can now jump during slide - Dash jump grants a very brief period with increased air control (30% for 0.25s) - Shrine is now easier to kill for the first one and harder for the second. HP from 8100 to 5000/10000 (HP updates after the first one dies, like Walkers) - Shrines attack no...
store.steampowered.com

posterReplies.content:
- Golden Egg Goose: Souls Per Minute increased from 75 to 90
- Torment Pulse: Pulse Damage reduced from 27+0.25 to 25+0.23

- Doorman: Hotel Guest T3 late checkout cooldown increased from 10s to 13s

- Ivy: Entangling Thorns spirit scaling reduced from 0.55 to 0.45

- Paradox: Pulse Grenade spirit scaling reduced from 0.4 to 0.3
- Paradox: Time Wall slow duration increased from 1.25s to 2s
- Paradox: Time Wall T1 now also increases duration by +2.5s
- Paradox: Time Wall T2 no longer increases duration by +2.5s
- Paradox: Time Wall T2 now also silences enemies for 2.3s
- Paradox: Paradoxical Swap damage changed from 10% Current Health to 125 with 1.1 spirit scaling
- Paradox: Paradoxical Swap T3 changed from 10% Current Health to 10% Max Health
- Paradox: Paradoxical Swap can now be alt casted to swap only a single target with the T3

- Silver: Lycan Curse base health bonus increased from +75 to +125
- Silver: Lycan Curse T2 increased from +3m to +4m

- Viscous: Splatter T3 spirit scaling reduced from 1.3 to 1.1
- Viscous: Puddle Punch scaling reduced from 1.1 to 1.0

- Wraith: Card Trick Spade reduced from +70% to +60%
- Wraith: Card Trick Heart scaling reduced from 1.25 to 1.0
- Wraith: Card Trick T3 Heart scaling increased from 0.5 to 0.75
- Wraith: Fixed Card Trick Heart heal doing full value for non-heroes (instead of half)
- Wraith: Telekinesis debuff duration reduced from 3s to 2.75s
